description: ['Climb the large flake right of Slot Machine to a ledge.  Move into left crack for harder, cleaner finish or move right to bush whack to the top.  Good lead for 5.7, tricky gear.']
['Obvious chimney half way up the gully.  Several variations.  Expect to find scout troops camped out on this climb.']
['Vertical hand crack to the right of Stairway to Heaven.  Climb crack to overhanging off-width (crux).  Above is easy, dirty climbing to top.']
['Large off-width/squeeze chimney in the center of the wall.  Very polished as this is where every one seems to camp out.']
protection: ['SR, there is a chock stone about half way up you can sling.']

description: ['Diagonal hand crack that starts on the left side of the wall.  Joins the route A-Wall then tops out.  The wall above the crack is not able to be protected.']
['Vertical hand crack right of the diagonal crack Lefty and Poncho.  The crack disappears two thirds of the way up.  Continue on slopers and pockets to top.']
protection: ['SR, mostly hand size.  Upper head wall is not able to be protected.']

description: ['Opening dyno followed by more long moves.']
location: ['#3rd route on the left, to the right of Fat Chicks.']

description: ['An easy 5.6 section to the left of a chossy arete leads you to a bulge and some hidden holds.']
['Technical and strength route. Start on small hold to a two figure pocket. Then to a left hand ledge. Go up to good pockets. Have fun.']

route_name: Sneaky D.L. Fingers on the Hush Hush
description: ['The crux is right off the ground. The first move is probably the hardest. The next 3 are still hard but become sequentially easier. The first few holds are wet, so bring a rag to dry them off. The route becomes significantly easier from there on up.']
location: ['This is the left most route on the T Wall.']
protection: ["I would highly recommend clipping at least the first 2 bolts before trying the route. It's an easy repel down, or you can stick clip them."]

description: ["I couldn't find a definitive crux. I think this route offers some pretty amazing movement. Movement that I've never gotten the opportunity to do on any other route in Iowa. I also really enjoyed this route because I felt that it is not too strenuous on the fingers, but it requires full body engagement the whole way through. Thank you Troy Davison for taking the time to bolt this amazing line!"]
location: ['The route is the middle of the three routes on the T-Wall. The start is on the left of the bolt line.']
protection: ["This route requires 5 bolts and the anchors. I recommend clipping the first 2 bolts to keep it safe and fun, as the landing could be bad if you don't. I also suggest brining a friend along who offers their full support. Thanks, James!"]

description: ['*Copied description from climbing.com**', '', '"THE CLASSIC HARD BACKBONE CLIMB. Climb the thin crack to a dihedral (about 45 ft up). Stem the dihedral to a ledge. Top out on a hard hanging offwidth. (~70 feet)"', '', "50' to the left of Devil's Hideaway (the one with the obvious roof)."]
protection: ['Trees near the top you can sling for anchors.']

description: ['25 feet right of Monster Crack. Climb the hand crack up to the large roof. Go left through the roof and the hold all but disapear.']
location: ['Follow The Backbone Trail down to the west side and loop back to the bend in the river. There are several steep short cuts for a more adventurous trip to the bottom.']
protection: ['Set top rope anchors from two trees directly above the route']

description: ['lots of bad 2 finger pockets, the grade can be disputed.']
['somewhat polished, grade is more consistant than Atropine']
['From my observations, the difficulty of this climb is more consistent than Soul.']
location: ['Route to the left of Soul Ignition.']

description: ['Has one really tough move']
location: ['One route left of Bird in Hand.']

description: ['Route shares rap hangers with Wild Iowa.']
location: ['2nd route from the left, right of Wild Iowa.']
protection: ['2 bolts, rap hangers(same as Wild Iowa).']

description: ['Make the clip on the second bolt, breathe and finish it.']
location: ['Third from the right. Left of Virgin, crack and cave to the left.']

description: ['Bouldery start on polished holds, pull a bulge and jugs to the top, pumpy.']
location: ['Right of Bird in hand, first route left of Gotz Crack.']
protection: ['4 bolts(3 of which are spinners), rap hangers']
